Feature_Name: F1AP UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST Message Procedure of Inter-gNB-DU LTM Handover
Feature_Description: This procedure is used for the case when the UE moves from one gNB-DU to another gNB-DU within the same gNB-CU during NR operation for LTM (L1/L2 Triggered Mobility).
The gNB-CU determines to initiate LTM configuration based on L3 measurement reports from the UE.
The gNB-CU sends a UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message to the candidate gNB-DU(s) to create a UE context and setup one or more data bearers for LTM.
Feature_Objectives: To establish a UE context and setup data bearers in a candidate gNB-DU for L1/L2 Triggered Mobility (LTM) during an inter-gNB-DU handover within the same gNB-CU.
To provide the candidate gNB-DU with LTM-specific configurations, such as CSI resource configuration, LTM configuration ID mapping list, PRACH resources, and lower layer configurations for reference.

Information_Elements.IE_Definition: The UEContextSetupRequestIEs is the main Information Element for the F1AP UE CONTEXT SETUP REQUEST message, containing all IEs for the message. For Inter-gNB-DU LTM, it includes LTM-specific configurations such as CSI resource configuration for subsequent LTM, LTM configuration ID mapping list, PRACH resources, and lower layer configuration.
CSI resource configuration for subsequent LTM
The LTM configuration ID mapping list
PRACH resources requested from the candidate gNB-DU(s) for LTM
Lower layer configuration for the purpose of generating the reference configuration or the lower layer part of the reference configuration for LTM
